# Apex News DZ

> Apex News DZ (أبكس نيوز الجزائر) — a bilingual Arabic/English news site covering Algeria, the Arab world, and international affairs across politics, sports, economy, culture, and technology.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Latest headlines, breaking news ticker, and featured stories.
- [Search](/search): Full-text search across articles, filterable by category and tag.
- [Bookmarks](/bookmarks): Reader-saved articles (stored locally in the browser).
- [Contact](/contact): Contact form and editorial inquiries.

## Sections

- [Algeria](/topic/algeria): National news from Algeria.
- [World](/topic/world): International news.
- [Economy](/topic/economy): Business, markets, energy.
- [Sports](/topic/sports): Football and other sports.
- [Culture](/topic/culture): Arts, heritage, society.
- [Technology](/topic/tech): Tech, science, digital.

## Editorial & Legal

- [About us](/about): Mission, team, editorial values.
- [Editorial charter](/editorial-policy): Standards for sourcing, accuracy, and independence.
- [Corrections & right of reply](/corrections): How to request a correction.
- [Corrections log](/corrections-log): Public record of published corrections.
- [Legal notice / Imprint](/imprint): Publisher information.
- [Privacy policy](/privacy): How we handle reader data.
- [Cookies policy](/cookies): Cookies and tracking.
- [Terms of use](/terms): Terms governing use of the site.
- [Copyright policy](/copyright): Reuse and DMCA contacts.
- [Content disclaimer](/disclaimer): Limits of liability on published content.
